name: reset_project
full_help:
reset_project

Description: 
Reset current project

Syntax: 
reset_project  [-exclude_runs] [-exclude_ips] [-exclude_sim_runs] [-quiet]
               [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name                 Description
  --------------------------------
  [-exclude_runs]      Do not reset runs
  [-exclude_ips]       Do not reset ips
  [-exclude_sim_runs]  Do not reset simulation runs
  [-quiet]             Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]           Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Project

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
